mapper.sql: id, mushroom_id, content_type, title, author_id, publish_date, praise_count, review_count, collect_count, content, video_url, description, source_url, content_status, audit_time, reject_reason, create_time

-- 日期权重：近7天=5，近30天=3，近90天=1，其他=0.5 CASE WHEN publish_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 5 WHEN publish_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 3 WHEN publish_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0.5 END + -- 点赞权重：praise_count/100 (praise_count / 100) + -- 评论权重：review_count/50 (review_count / 50)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mh_popsci_content WHERE content_type = #{contentType} AND content_status = 2 -- 仅审核通过 AND publish_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY () DESC, RAND() -- 先按权重降序，再随机 LIMIT #{targetCount};
SELECT popsci_id FROM mh_user_favorite_popsci WHERE user_id = #{userId};
